_comment: Merge into your Claude Code settings.json (user-level %USERPROFILE%/.claude/settings.json or project .claude/settings.json). Replace the placeholder with the absolute path to engramory_index_guard.py. On Windows USE FORWARD SLASHES (e.g. E:/path/to/engramory/hooks/engramory_index_guard.py) — single backslashes get eaten by the hook shell. The script path is double-quoted so a path with spaces (e.g. Program Files) still works; keep the quotes.
